description: create a realtime alert rule on Alert Bridge (POST /api/v1/realtime) — Workflow D
rules: VLM real-time mode only — CV deployments do not run Alert Bridge subscriptions (refuse with the canonical redeploy hint)
sends the canonical payload: live_stream_url + alert_type + prompt (required) plus the skill-default system_prompt='Answer yes or no', chunk_duration=30, chunk_overlap_duration=5
sensor_id must be the VIOS sensor UUID (resolve via vss-manage-video-io-storage GET /sensor/list), not the sensor name
derive alert_type as a short snake_case tag from the detection condition in THIS request only — never reuse a tag from an existing rule
Alert Bridge base is http://<HOST_IP>:9080; never route create through the VSS Agent /generate endpoint
usage: Set HOST_IP, LIVE_STREAM_URL (rtsp:// stream of the camera), ALERT_TYPE (snake_case tag), PROMPT (verbatim detection condition). Optional: SENSOR_ID, SENSOR_NAME, SYSTEM_PROMPT, CHUNK_DURATION, CHUNK_OVERLAP, ALERT_BRIDGE_URL (override base). The porter POSTs the rule and records the HTTP status + response as one JSON audit line. Output: subscribe_create.json.
limitation: Requires the VSS alerts profile deployed in VLM real-time mode with Alert Bridge reachable at http://<HOST_IP>:9080. Realtime rules require a live rtsp:// stream; file-based sensors are rejected by the service. Offline / unreachable Alert Bridge degrades gracefully (records http_code=000) without creating a rule.

vars.PROMPT: flag anyone without a safety vest
